name: Gingerbread Teddy Bear Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Dark or Light Corn Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine butter, brown sugar, and corn syrup. Cook and stir over medium heat until the butter is melted and sugar is dissolved.
2. Pour mixture into a large mixing bowl and let cool for 5 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in a separate bowl, whisk together flour, cinnamon, ginger, baking soda, and cloves.
4. Add the beaten egg and vanilla extract to the butter mixture and mix well.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and beat until smooth.
6. Divide the dough into two portions.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
To shape:
1. Roll one portion of dough into a 1-inch ball (head).
2. Flatten the head slightly and roll out another ball into a 1/2-inch thickness (body).
3. Roll six balls into 1/2-inch pieces for arms.
4. Roll five balls into 1/4-inch pieces for legs and ears.
5. Attach the leg pieces to the body, ensuring they extend beyond the ends for paws.
6. Use miniature chocolate pieces for eyes and the navel.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
10. Pipe on bow ties with royal icing, if desired.
Makes 16 cookies.
